headline: Smarter motion wallpaper pausing
summary: Canvas now keeps motion playing anywhere the desktop is visible and pauses only displays covered by full-screen apps or Split View. Low Power Mode pausing is optional, while sustained high CPU usage still protects the whole Mac.

features.title: Pause only covered displays
features.description: Canvas pauses motion on the display occupied by a full-screen app while visible desktops on other displays keep animating.

features.title: Split View aware
features.description: Two apps covering a display in Split View now pause that display too, then playback resumes when the desktop becomes visible.

features.title: Resource controls without surprises
features.description: Sustained high CPU usage can pause all motion playback. Low Power Mode pausing remains available but is now off by default.
